name: tacit
description: Writing tools for software engineers: one prose editor (structure, concision, surface) and an opt-in laconic register.

plugins.name: prose
plugins.description: One-pass editor for work prose. Structure and concision via the Williams & Bizup method, surface de-slop adapted from Hardik Pandya's stop-slop, and an opt-in Klinkenborg-inspired laconic register. Replaces the clarity-and-grace, laconic, and stop-slop plugins.
